pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies the project to this path and projectlibre opens it.

pi_items.source: Verified by parsing the base file (sample_project.xml) and the python script in setup_task.sh which injects these exact 4 errors. The base project contains tasks matching the stated names and predecessor relationships.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a standard 'Commercial Construction' sample project file located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. Exactly four dependency errors are injected into the schedule by the setup script: 1) Task 48 predecessor changed from UID 44 to 43; 2) Task 57 predecessor 55 link type changed from 1 (Finish-to-Start) to 3 (Start-to-Finish); 3) Task 89 missing predecessor UID 88; 4) Task 111 has a spurious predecessor UID 109 added. These injected errors exactly match the metadata claims.
